FARM MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE OF THE YEAR 2025 — by AgriBusiness Review

# The Leading Farm Management    Software for Modern Growers

Simplify every aspect of your farm, from crop planning and task management to sales, accounting, and inventory, all powered by AI in one seamless platform.

[Get Started. It's Free](https://www.tend.com/pricing)

See How it Works

Farm Management Software

Designed for Every Grower

[![Crop Management Software](https://www.tend.com/images/home/solution-img-2.webp)\\
\\
Crop Management](https://www.tend.com/solutions/crop-management-software)

[![Flower Farm Management](https://www.tend.com/images/home/solution-img-8.webp)\\
\\
Flower Farm Management](https://www.tend.com/solutions/flower-farm-management)

[![Vineyard Management](https://www.tend.com/images/home/solution-img-7.webp)\\
\\
Vineyard Management](https://www.tend.com/solutions/vineyard-management)

[![Orchard Management](https://www.tend.com/images/home/solution-img-6.webp)\\
\\
Orchard Management](https://www.tend.com/solutions/orchard-management-software)

[![Nursery Management](https://www.tend.com/images/home/solution-img-3.webp)\\
\\
Nursery Management](https://www.tend.com/solutions/nursery-management-software)

[![Microgreens Business Management](https://www.tend.com/images/home/solution-img-4.webp)\\
\\
Microgreens Business Management](https://www.tend.com/solutions/microgreens-management)

One Centralized Place

to Manage Your Farm

Crop LibraryCrop PlanningTasks & LaborMulti-Channel SalesInventoryAccountingAnalytics

Your Crops, Your Way

Build a personalized Crop Library tailored to your farm's crops and cultivation methods, including annuals and perennials.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Start fast with auto-populated data from Tend's global crop database, including spacing, days to maturity, and yield.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Easily customize crop details to match your growing practices.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Copy data across crops, varieties, or harvest stages to save time.

[Explore the Crop Library](https://www.tend.com/feature/crop-library)

![Image of crop-library-img from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/crop-library-img.webp)

Web & Mobile

Cloud-Based

Offline Mode

Expect More From Your

Farm Management Software

Tend is designed to help you streamline your workflows, gain full visibility of your operation, and dig into profit-driving insights—all while spending less time in front of a screen.

SEAMLESS TRACEABILITY

Streamline Farm Certifications With Traceability

Tend automatically tracks every step of your product's journey—from seed to sale—ensuring you're always audit-ready.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Generate detailed reports for organic, regenerative, and food safety certifications.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Track inputs, storage, and transport for complete traceability.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Eliminate the scramble to track down documents during inspections.

[Discover Traceability](https://www.tend.com/feature/produce-traceability-software)

![Streamline Farm Certifications With Traceability](https://www.tend.com/images/home/Farm_Traceability_FarmManagementSoftware.webp)

POWERFUL COLLABORATION TOOLS

Keep Your Crew Aligned and Productive

Tend makes it easy for everyone to track what needs to get done—because when your whole team is aligned, your farm is more productive.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Assign tasks to your team with just a click.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Convert notes into tasks instantly to avoid losing details.

![Image of point from home](https://www.tend.com/images/home/point.webp)

Keep data updated online and offline with searchable records.

Explore All Features

![Keep Your Crew Aligned and Productive](https://www.tend.com/images/home/Collaboration_Tools_FarmManagementSoftware.webp)

Manage Your Farm From the Field

Your farm isn't static, and neither is Tend. When plans change, easily update tasks, planting dates, yields, and inputs right from your phone. All related tasks and data update automatically to keep everything in sync.

[Try Tend for Free](https://www.tend.com/pricing) [reservation-completedBook a Personalized Demo](https://calendly.com/d/cqtj-jqz-494)

Efficient Farms Run on Tend

Growers of all scales and specialties use Tend's farm management software to build and run successful agribusinesses.

- ![Slide 1](https://www.tend.com/images/solutions/nursery-management/avatar-image-2.webp)




Aslan Organics







Camlachie, Ontario, Canada









I tend to be an in-the-moment, flexible worker and thinker... I'm better at recognizing what needs to be done in real time — in part because I don't need to think about the planned things that Tend provides.





Shane Rozeveld, Owner



[Read Their Story](https://www.tend.com/customers/the-agrarian-kitchen)

- ![Slide 2](https://www.tend.com/images/home/efficient-img-3.webp)




The Agrarian Kitchen







New Norfolk, Tasmania, Australia









With a lot of our data collection, it's about finding trends over many years. Having that all organized in one space so we don't have to have different spreadsheets over different years is incredibly useful.





Mitch Thiessen, Head Gardener



[Read Their Story](https://www.tend.com/customers/the-agrarian-kitchen)

- ![Slide 3](https://www.tend.com/images/home/efficient-img-2.webp)




Athiana Acres







Richmond, British Columbia, Canada









We rely on Tend for numerous aspects of our farm's operations - it balances simplicity and depth of information seamlessly. Having one place to hold all of our planting, seeding, harvesting, and sales information has saved countless staff hours.





Daniel Garfinkel, Farm Manager



[Read Their Story](https://www.tend.com/customers/the-agrarian-kitchen)

We use cookies to keep our website running smoothly and to understand how farmers use our tools so we can improve your experience. Some cookies are necessary, while others (like analytics) are optional. [Cookie Policy](https://www.tend.com/terms-and-privacy/privacy#cookies)
